rulings.Case Title: CHASE SECURITIES VS LSI LOGIC CORP
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Application And Application For An Award Of Prejudgment Interest
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR PREJUDGMENT INTEREST DENIED. SUM IS NOT CERTAIN. PLAINTIFF STIPULATED TO TAKE LOWEST STOCK PRICE ON DATE OF SALE TO AVOID TRIAL IN PREVIOUS MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: NORTHBAY HEALTHCARE VS STATE OF CALIF
rulings.Rulings: 1)DEMURRER OVERRULED. TIMELINESS OF GOVERNMENT CLAIM AND TIMELINESS OF FILING THIS ACTION PRESENT FACTUAL QUESTIONS WHICH CANNOT BE RESOLVED ON DEMURRER. 2)DEMURRER RE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS UNDER CCP 337 OVERRULED. GOVERNMENT CODE CONTROLS. 3)DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR IMPLIED CONTRACT, QUANTUM MERUIT, PROMISSORY ESTOPPEL. NO AUTHORITY TO ALLEGE IMPLIED CONTRACT AGAINST PUBLIC AGENCY. 4) MOTION TO STRIKE ALLEGATIONS OF WRITTEN CONTRACT GRANTED. LEAVE TO AMEND NOT PREVIOUSLY SOUGHT. 5)DEMURRER TO ACCOUNTS STATED CAUSE OF ACTION OVERRULED. (CW)
